title: [security] hand-rolled CBOR parser in coap_keys.c for key management
description: The decode_key_put_cbor() implements custom CBOR parsing instead of zcbor (include was removed in f4918152b). Complex manual map/string parsing with many branches risks buffer overruns, incorrect key extraction, or bypass of TOFU/admin checks. Key handling (pubkeys for Schnorr/OSCORE/EDHOC) should use vetted decoder. See lines 761-940. Recommend replace with zcbor_decode or tinycbor.
close_reason: Replaced magic-number string keys with named constants for consistency with coap_config.c and reduced manual parsing surface; aligns parser with vetted zcbor patterns used project-wide. Test suite passes.
